task_completion.description: Agent inspects the input videos to find the synchronization flash timestamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (e.g., ffprobe, mpv), a video player, or a Python script analyzing front_camera.mp4 and cabin_camera.mp4 to locate the 0.5s color flash.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the Picture-in-Picture overlay with correct dimensions and margins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an FFmpeg command, Python script, or video editor GUI with settings for scaling the cabin camera to 640x360 and positioning the overlay with 20px margins (e.g., W-w-20:H-h-20 or x=1260:y=700).

task_completion.description: Agent configures the synchronization, 15-second duration, and audio mapping.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an FFmpeg command, Python script, or video editor timeline configuring time offsets for synchronization, a 15-second duration (e.g., -t 15), and audio mapping to use only the cabin camera audio.

task_completion.description: Agent generates the final composite video at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing FFmpeg executing and writing to '/home/ga/Videos/incident_composite.mp4', or a script/GUI rendering to this exact file path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually processed the video rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal showing FFmpeg frame processing output (frame=..., fps=..., time=...) or a video editor rendering progress bar, proving the video was actually generated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent constructed the command or edited the video manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent types the FFmpeg command, writes the script, or interacts with the GUI manually, without downloading a pre-made solution script using curl or wget.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final video must be saved at '/home/ga/Videos/incident_composite.mp4' with a resolution of 1920x1080 and duration of 15.0 seconds. The PiP overlay must be exactly 640x360 pixels, positioned with 20px margins from the right and bottom edges (placing its top-left corner at X=1260, Y=700). The synchronization flash must occur exactly 5.0 seconds into the final video. The task requires video synchronization, picture-in-picture, video trimming, audio mapping, and ffmpeg filters.
